name: scalarian/oh-my-codex
summary: Codex-native orchestration product built around `.omx/` state, review queues, and tmux team runtime so long-running work can be resumed instead of reassembled from chat history.
evidence: Implements a real Codex-native workflow product with durable .omx state, task graph, review queue, and tmux-aware team execution.
Ships reusable skills, agent templates, hooks, plugins, and runtime docs that make the workflow model inspectable and reusable.
